# livck_probes (Data Source)

The active monitoring locations. Use the `code` values for `livck_service.settings.assigned_probes`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "livck_probes" "all" {}

output "probe_codes" {
  value = [for p in data.livck_probes.all.probes : p.code]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `probes` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--probes))

<a id="nestedatt--probes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `probes`

Read-Only:

- `code` (String)
- `country_code` (String)
- `location` (String)
- `name` (String)
